items.title: Bitcoin rises to $69,000, stocks reverse big early losses, as crude oil sinks back below $100

items.title: EU’s regulated blockchain securities market adds first bank participant
items.summary: Swiss crypto bank Amina has joined 21X as a regulated banking participant, linking traditional financial institutions with a blockchain-based market for issuing tokenized securities.

items.title: Josh Swihart's Zcash Open Development Lab raises $25 million in seed funding
items.summary: The capital will be used to expand development of the Zcash (ZEC) protocol and its privacy-focused self-custodial mobile wallet, Zodl.

items.title: Global insurance broker Aon tests stablecoin payments with Coinbase, Paxos
items.summary: The firm used USDC on Ethereum and PayPal USD on Solana for insurance premium payments, testing how stablecoins could reshape settlements.

items.title: XRP holders face $50B in unrealized losses as it trades below $1.40
items.summary: 60% of XRP's circulating supply trades underwater at $1.35, with spot ETF outflows and weak sentiment adding pressure on the bulls amid the current slump.

items.title: Stock market volatility hits one-year high, possibly marking bitcoin bottom
items.summary: Bitcoin has its own volatility gauge (BVIV), and that spiked in early February, suggesting crypto markets may have already experienced their panic phase.
